behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names LocalFont, stylesheet(), weights parameter, --website flag, url('static/...) to url('/...) rewrite, numeric weights 400/700, and file-path text names like 'Regular'/'Bold'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the desired behavior but doesn't dictate specific variable names like css_weight/file_weight or exact line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check CSS output via regex and subprocess behavior; they don't assert on internal variable names or specific implementation details.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import LocalFont/GoogleFont and call stylesheet(), and invoke scripts/generate_theme.py via subprocess.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require real numeric weights (400, 700), custom weight lists, and subprocess behavior — a stub couldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four requirements (numeric weights, custom weights list, --website flag, path-weight pairing) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and have descriptive names/docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces CSS, not structured data; CSS format is described in instruction.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names look correct (gradio/themes/utils/fonts.py, scripts/generate_theme.py).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions LocalFont class and theme generation script generally without pointing to specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-fix task, not an agent-config edit task.
